homepage.title: Micro-Vu Precision Measurement Equipment
homepage.description: Micro-Vu manufactures non-contact and multisensor measurement machines including Automated Vision Systems, Manual Vision Systems, and Optical Comparators for measuring, quality assurance, and incoming inspection
